label: Alaba International Market
note: Alaba is one of the country's most visible informal e-waste processing hubs and a central site in the wider health and contamination picture.

label: Ikeja Computer Village
note: Ikeja combines repair, resale, component stripping, and broader electronics circulation inside Lagos's digital economy.

label: Kano Markets
note: Kano represents the northward spread of informal electronics recovery and resale activity beyond Lagos.

label: FCT Markets
note: Markets in the Federal Capital Territory show that informal recovery is not isolated to one coastal corridor.

label: Lagos Ports
note: Lagos ports remain the main gateway for used electrical and electronic equipment entering the country.
